skill1.kitLine: Activates after Full Burst ends. Affects all allies. Continuously recovers 4.06% of the skill user's final Max HP every 1 sec for 5 sec.
skill1.where: unmodeled.skill1[0]; skill1 block array is empty []
skill1.note: Heal — inert vs partless boss. Parser-sourced (blablalink), NOT hand-verified per note.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge; if HP of 2 lowest-HP allies < 30%, recovers 2.03% of skill user's final Max HP as HP.
skill1.note: Conditional heal — inert vs boss; also no recovery events emitted to recovery-trigger consumers.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge; if HP of 2 lowest-HP allies < 50%, recovers 1.57% of skill user's final Max HP as HP.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at start of battle (only if self alive). Affects all Electric Code allies with assault rifles. Max HP ▲ 44.98% of skill user's Max HP without restoring HP, constantly.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger passive, target alliesOfElementWeapon Electric/AR count 99, buff casterMaxHpPct 44.98
skill2.note: Start-of-battle constant buff modeled as passive (equivalent). Offensively INERT per THEME-13 caveat — ally-granted Max HP doesn't feed atkOfMaxHpPct; kit-SSOT completeness only.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at start of battle. Affects 1 leftmost Electric Code ally with assault rifles. Invulnerable for 2 sec.
skill2.note: Invulnerability — inert in damage-only sim (no ally-death modeling).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects 1 leftmost Electric Code ally with assault rifles. Attack Damage ▲ 94.15% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger burstCast, target alliesOfElementWeapon Electric/AR count 1, buff attackDamagePct 94.15 / 10s
skill2.note: Target now EXACT (leftmost Electric-AR ally) via alliesOfElementWeapon — the run-B heat fix; old alliesOfElement was feeding +94% AD to RL carries + Trina herself.

skill2.kitLine: (same burstCast trigger) Reload Speed ▲ 50.82% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: Co-located in the same burstCast block as the 94.15% AD.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Max HP ▲ 20.14% of skill user's Max HP without restoring HP for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0]: trigger burstCast, target allies, buff casterMaxHpPct 20.14 / 10s
burst.note: Offensively INERT per THEME-13 caveat — no board damage moves; kit-SSOT completeness only.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Attack Damage ▲ 20.9% for 10 sec.
Activates when enemy count aside from Nikkes is 1. Affects all allies. Spread Roots: Burst Skill damage of skills with 'Affects all enemies' ▲ 435.6% for 5 sec.
burst.note: ⚑ FIRES in solo raid (enemy count = 1) and is NOT modeled — engine has no burst-skill-dmg-amp. Teammate all-enemies B3 nukes within 5s of Trina burst miss a huge amp (teammates read COLD). Documented HOT confound / feature request.

burst.kitLine: Activates when enemy count aside from Nikkes is more than 2. Affects all allies. Changes Spread Roots to Wilted Roots.
burst.note: Mode-switch rider; irrelevant in solo raid (enemy count = 1, so Spread Roots branch applies, not Wilted).

burst.kitLine: Wilted Roots: Burst Skill damage of skills with 'Affects all enemies' ▲ 64.46% for 5 sec.
burst.note: Alternate (multi-target) form of the same unexpressible burst-skill-dmg-amp; inert in solo raid.

burst.kitLine: Affects all Electric Code allies with assault rifles. Hit Rate ▲ 45.3% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Skipped deliberately — no misses vs boss (note: 'Hit Rate 45.3 skipped (no misses vs boss)'). Inert in scope.

burst.kitLine: Affects all Electric Code allies with assault rifles. Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 20 round(s) for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[1]: trigger burstCast, target alliesOfElementWeapon Electric/AR count 99, buff maxAmmoPct 33.3 / 10s
burst.note: FLAT 20 rounds encoded as +33.3% (engine only supports percent), assuming a 60-round AR base magazine. Scope corrected from parser's all-Electric +20% to Electric-AR allies.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Spread Roots (435.6% Burst-Skill-damage amp on 'Affects all enemies' skills) FIRES in solo raid (enemy count = 1) and is NOT modeled — teammate all-enemies B3 burst nukes within 5s of Trina's burst miss a large amp (teammates read COLD in Trina comps).
documentedConfounds.why: Real, in-scope amp that the engine cannot express; directly suppresses modeled teammate burst damage in Trina comps — a known source of COLD teammates / comp-level gap.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: Max Ammunition +20 rounds is encoded as maxAmmoPct 33.3 (assumes a 60-round AR base magazine).
documentedConfounds.why: Reasonable percent-encoding of a flat value for standard 60-round ARs; only misfires for non-60-round AR magazines. Minor approximation, not a structural gap.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: heals are unmodeled — recovery-trigger consumers (e.g. Crown's 'when recovery takes effect') get no events from Trina.
documentedConfounds.why: Heals are inert vs the partless boss; only matters for recovery-trigger teammates, which are out of the damage-scope. Known inert drop, not a damage surprise.

documentedConfounds.text: [THEME-13] The two 'Max HP ▲ X% of skill user's Max HP' grants are modeled as casterMaxHpPct (S2 44.98% → Electric-AR allies passive; burst 20.14% → all allies 10s). Offensively INERT: ally-granted Max HP does not feed a teammate's atkOfMaxHpPct conversion (e3 rule) — no board damage moves.
documentedConfounds.why: Explicitly ruled inert for damage; added for kit-SSOT completeness only. Cannot move board numbers by design.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1 was auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose), behavior-identical to prior runtime parse, NOT hand-verified.
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance flag on the (inert, unmodeled) heal lines only; no modeled damage effect depends on skill1.

documentedConfounds.text: ks-extract finding: HOT is attributed to the weapon-fire model (cadence tuple / RL core crediting), not the skill kit; hard-rule violations F1/F3/F5/F8 = dropped heals/HP-grants/hit-rate.
documentedConfounds.why: The board HOT (ratio 1.151, >15% band) is ascribed to Trina's RL normal-attack/core-crediting model rather than any skill line — the skill kit's documented gaps (Spread Roots aside) are inert, so residual heat likely lives in the weapon-fire path, outside this skill-override review.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Trina's offensive support contribution: S2's burstCast +94.15% Attack Damage and +50.82% Reload Speed to the single leftmost Electric-AR ally (now targeted EXACTLY via alliesOfElementWeapon — the run-B heat fix that stopped feeding RL carries/Trina herself), plus burst's team-wide +20.9% AD and +20 rounds ammo (encoded as +33.3% on a 60-round AR assumption, scoped to Electric-AR allies). Her two Max HP grants are encoded as casterMaxHpPct for kit-SSOT completeness but are ruled offensively INERT (THEME-13). Deliberately unmodeled: all skill1 heals (inert vs boss), S2 invulnerability, burst Hit Rate (no misses vs boss), and the Spread Roots/Wilted Roots burst-skill-damage riders — the latter FIRES in solo raid and is the one documented HOT skill-kit gap (engine has no burst-skill-dmg-amp; teammates read COLD). Per the ks-extract, the unit's overall HOT board reading is attributed to the RL weapon-fire/core-crediting model rather than these skill lines.
